We argue that the ceiling on organizational AI is not retrieval fidelity but \emph{epistemic} fidelity--the system's ability to represent commitment strength, contradiction status, and organizational ignorance as computable properties.
  We present OIDA, a framework that structures organizational knowledge as typed Knowledge Objects carrying epistemic class, importance scores with class-specific decay, and signed contradiction edges. The Knowledge Gravity Engine maintains scores deterministically with proved convergence guarantees (sufficient condition: max degree $< 7$; empirically robust to degree 43). OIDA introduces QUESTION-as-modeled-ignorance: a primitive with inverse decay that surfaces what an organization does \emph{not} know with increasing urgency--a mechanism absent from all surveyed systems. We describe the Epistemic Quality Score (EQS), a five-component evaluation methodology with explicit circularity analysis. In a controlled comparison ($n{=}10$ response pairs), OIDA's RAG condition (3,868 tokens) achieves EQS 0.530 vs.\ 0.848 for a full-context baseline (108,687 tokens); the $28.1\times$ token budget difference is the primary confound. The QUESTION mechanism is statistically validated (Fisher $p{=}0.0325$, OR$=21.0$). The formal properties are established; the decisive ablation at equal token budget (E4) is pre-registered and not yet run.

</details>


### [603] [GenTac: Generative Modeling and Forecasting of Soccer Tactics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11786)
*Jiayuan Rao,Tianlin Gui,Haoning Wu,Yanfeng Wang,Weidi Xie*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: GenTac是一个基于扩散模型的生成框架，用于模拟足球等团队运动的开放战术，能够生成多样化的球员轨迹和战术事件预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有计算方法通常只能产生确定性的轨迹预测或专注于高度结构化的定位球，无法捕捉真实比赛中固有的变化和分支可能性，因此需要一种能够建模足球战术随机性的新方法。

Method: 引入GenTac扩散生成框架，将足球战术建模为连续多球员轨迹和离散语义事件的随机过程。通过历史追踪数据学习球员移动的底层分布，支持丰富的上下文条件（对手行为、球队风格、战略目标），并将连续空间动态映射到15类战术事件空间。

Result: 在TacBench基准测试中，GenTac展示了四个关键能力：高几何精度和团队结构一致性；准确模拟风格差异；支持可控的反事实模拟；可靠预测未来战术结果。此外，该框架成功推广到篮球、美式足球和冰球等其他动态团队运动。

Conclusion: GenTac为建模开放战术提供了一个有效的生成框架，能够捕捉足球等团队运动的随机性和多样性，支持丰富的战术分析和模拟应用，并具有跨运动泛化的潜力。

Abstract: Modeling open-play soccer tactics is a formidable challenge due to the stochastic, multi-agent nature of the game. Existing computational approaches typically produce single, deterministic trajectory forecasts or focus on highly structured set-pieces, fundamentally failing to capture the inherent variance and branching possibilities of real-world match evolution. Here, we introduce GenTac, a diffusion-based generative framework that conceptualizes soccer tactics as a stochastic process over continuous multi-player trajectories and discrete semantic events. By learning the underlying distribution of player movements from historical tracking data, GenTac samples diverse, plausible, long-horizon future trajectories. The framework supports rich contextual conditioning, including opponent behavior, specific team or league playing styles, and strategic objectives, while grounding continuous spatial dynamics into a 15-class tactical event space. Extensive evaluations on our proposed benchmark, TacBench, demonstrate four key capabilities: (1) GenTac achieves high geometric accuracy while strictly preserving the collective structural consistency of the team; (2) it accurately simulates stylistic nuances, distinguishing between specific teams (e.g., Auckland FC) and leagues (e.g., A-League versus German leagues); (3) it enables controllable counterfactual simulations, demonstrably altering spatial control and expected threat metrics based on offensive or defensive guidance; and (4) it reliably anticipates future tactical outcomes directly from generated rollouts. Finally, we demonstrate that GenTac can be successfully trained to generalize to other dynamic team sports, including basketball, American football, and ice hockey.

</details>


<div id='cs.NI'></div>

# cs.NI [[Back]](#toc)

### [604] [ML-Based Real-Time Downlink Performance Prediction in Standalone 5G NR Using Smartphones](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09632)
*Md Mahfuzur Rahman,Jareen Shuva,Nishith Tripathi,Jeffrey H. Reed,Lingjia Liu*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 使用商用智能手机收集5G物理层特征，通过五种监督回归模型预测下行性能，在多种真实场景中验证了吞吐量和误块率的准确预测能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统5G网络性能评估方法复杂且成本高，需要开发基于商用设备和机器学习的高效性能预测框架，以支持网络优化和用户体验保障。

Method: 搭建基于srsRAN 5G NR的测试平台，使用Google Pixel 7a智能手机收集CQI、MCS、比特率、TTI、BLER等物理层特征，在LOS/nLOS条件下进行静止和移动测量，使用五种回归模型进行性能预测。

Result: 实验结果表明，在多样化的真实5G场景中，使用商用硬件和标准机器学习技术可以准确预测吞吐量和误块率，为5G网络性能评估提供了实用解决方案。

Conclusion: 提出的基于机器学习的框架证明了使用商用设备和标准ML技术进行5G下行性能预测的可行性，为网络运营商提供了经济高效的性能监控和优化工具。

Abstract: We propose a machine learning (ML)-based framework for downlink performance prediction in 5G networks using real-time measurements from commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) user equipment (UE). Our experimental platform integrates the srsRAN 5G New Radio (NR) stack deployed on a Dell desktop serving as the 5G next generation nodeB (gNB), operating at 3.4 GHz. Two Google Pixel 7a smartphones are used to collect physical layer characteristics such as channel quality indicator (CQI), modulation and coding scheme (MCS), bit rate, transmission time interval (TTI), and block error rate (BLER), which are leveraged as predictors in model training. We use commercial-grade traffic generation tools, including Ookla, for stationary and mobility measurements under line-of-sight (LOS) and non-line-of-sight (nLOS) conditions. Test data includes global Ookla servers (e.g., USA, Portugal, Ghana, Egypt, Japan), iperf TCP/UDP data, and video streaming sessions from YouTube. To analyze inter-user interference, we also include scenarios with multiple UEs at the same location. We evaluate the predictive performance of five supervised regression models - linear regression, decision tree regression, random forest regression, extreme gradient boosting (XGBoost), light gradient boosting machine (LightGBM). Our results demonstrate that throughput and BLER can be accurately predicted using COTS hardware and standard ML techniques in diverse real-world 5G scenarios.

</details>


### [605] [NetAgentBench: A State-Centric Benchmark for Evaluating Agentic Network Configuration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09678)
*Ahmed Twabi,Yepeng Ding,Tohru Kondo*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: NetAgentBench：一个基于有限状态机的动态基准测试框架，用于评估网络管理代理在多轮交互中的行为稳定性，发现现有LLM代理在复杂网络配置中存在严重缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着代理式网络管理的普及，需要超越静态一次性测试的评估框架。现有方法无法有效评估代理在复杂、多轮操作中的行为稳定性和可靠性。

Method: 引入NetAgentBench动态基准测试框架，采用有限状态机形式化方法保证确定性、正确性和有界执行，为网络管理代理提供严格的评估基础。

Result: 对四种最先进的LLM代理进行实证评估，发现它们虽然能解决基本任务，但在专家级网络配置中表现出严重的探索崩溃和一致性崩溃问题。

Conclusion: 系统评估多轮行为稳定性是实现可信赖、完全自主网络不可或缺的一步，NetAgentBench为此提供了必要的评估框架。

Abstract: As agentic network management gains popularity, there is a critical need for evaluation frameworks that transcend static, one-shot testing. To address this, we introduce NetAgentBench, a dynamic benchmark that evaluates agent interactions through a Finite State Machine (FSM) formalization guaranteeing determinism, correctness, and bounded execution. This provides the networking landscape with a rigorous foundation to measure complex, multi-turn operational behaviors. Our empirical evaluation of four state-of-the-art LLM agents through diverse network configuration tasks reveals stark deficiencies: while agents can solve basic tasks, they suffer severe exploration meltdowns and coherence collapse during expert-level configurations. Ultimately, NetAgentBench demonstrates that systematically evaluating multi-turn behavioral stability is an indispensable step toward realizing trustworthy, fully autonomous networks.

</details>


### [606] [Hybrid Hierarchical Federated Learning over 5G/NextG Wireless Networking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09680)
*Haiyun Liu,Jiahao Xue,Jie Xu,Yao Liu,Zhuo Lu*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出混合层次联邦学习(HHFL)，允许重叠区域客户端同时连接多个边缘服务器进行模型聚合，解决传统HFL在5G/NextG网络中无法利用CoMP技术的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统层次联邦学习(HFL)架构限制每个客户端只能连接一个边缘服务器，无法充分利用5G/NextG网络中协调多点(CoMP)传输技术的优势，导致训练效率提升空间受限。

Method: 提出混合层次联邦学习(HHFL)，允许重叠区域的客户端同时与多个边缘服务器通信进行模型聚合，增强边缘服务器间的知识共享，减少模型发散。

Result: 理论收敛分析验证了HHFL的有效性。实验显示HHFL优于传统HFL，特别是在非IID数据场景下。当15/57客户端可连接多个边缘服务器时，HHFL收敛速度提升高达2倍。

Conclusion: HHFL为当前和下一代无线网络中的联邦学习模型训练提供了可扩展且高效的解决方案，特别适用于利用CoMP技术的现代网络架构。

Abstract: Today's 5G and NextG wireless networks are moving toward using the coordinated multi-point (CoMP) transmission and reception technique, where a client can be simultaneously served by multiple base stations (BSs) for better communication performance. However, traditional hierarchical federated learning (HFL) architectures impose the constraint that each client can be associated with only one edge server (ES) at a time. If we keep using the traditional HFL architectures in modern hierarchical networks for model training, the benefits of the CoMP technique would remain unexploited and leave room for further improvements in training efficiency. To address this issue, we propose hybrid hierarchical federated learning (HHFL), which allows clients in overlapping regions to simultaneously communicate with multiple edge servers (ESs) for model aggregation. HHFL is able to enhance inter-ES knowledge sharing, thereby mitigating model divergence and improving training efficiency. We provide a rigorous theoretical convergence analysis with a convergence upper bound to validate its effectiveness. Experimental results show that HHFL outperforms traditional HFL, particularly when the data across different ESs is not independent and identically distributed (non-IID). For example, when each ES is dominated by only two of the ten classes and 15 out of the 57 clients can connect to multiple ESs, HHFL achieves up to 2x faster convergence under the same configuration. These results demonstrate that HHFL provides a scalable and efficient solution for FL model training in today's and NextG wireless networks.

</details>


### [607] [R2E-VID: Two-Stage Robust Routing via Temporal Gating for Elastic Edge-Cloud Video Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09681)
*Zheming Yang,Lulu Zuo,Shun Lu,Yangyu Zhang,Zhicheng Li,Xiangyang Li,Yang You*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: R2E-VID：通过时间门控的两阶段鲁棒路由框架，用于弹性边缘-云视频推理，能动态适应异构视频内容和波动资源条件，显著降低延迟和成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有边缘-云协同视频分析系统无法动态适应异构视频内容和波动资源条件，导致路由效率低下和计算成本高。需要一种能弹性分配推理工作负载的解决方案。

Method: 提出两阶段框架：第一阶段引入时间门控机制，建模视频流的时间一致性和运动动态，预测每个片段的最优路由模式；第二阶段通过多模型适应的鲁棒路由优化模块，在动态网络和工作负载变化下联合最小化推理延迟和资源消耗。

Result: 在公开数据集上的实验表明，相比云中心基线，R2E-VID能降低高达60%的总成本；相比最先进的边缘-云解决方案，延迟降低35-45%，推理准确率提高2-7%。

Conclusion: R2E-VID通过时间门控和鲁棒路由优化，实现了细粒度时空弹性，显著提升了边缘-云视频推理的效率、准确性和成本效益。

Abstract: With the rapid growth of large-scale video analytics applications, edge-cloud collaborative systems have become the dominant paradigm for real-time inference. However, existing approaches often fail to dynamically adapt to heterogeneous video content and fluctuating resource conditions, resulting in suboptimal routing efficiency and high computational costs. In this paper, we propose R2E-VID, a two-stage robust routing framework via temporal gating for elastic edge-cloud video inference. In the first stage, R2E-VID introduces a temporal gating mechanism that models the temporal consistency and motion dynamics of incoming video streams to predict the optimal routing pattern for each segment. This enables adaptive partitioning of inference workloads between edge and cloud nodes, achieving fine-grained spatiotemporal elasticity. In the second stage, a robust routing optimization module refines the allocation through multi-model adaptation, jointly minimizing inference delay and resource consumption under dynamic network and workload variations. Extensive experiments on public datasets demonstrate that R2E-VID achieves up to 60% reduction in overall cost compared to cloud-centric baselines, and delivers 35-45% lower delay while improving inference accuracy by 2-7% over state-of-the-art edge-cloud solutions.

</details>


### [608] [Decision-Theoretic Safety Assessment of Persona-Driven Multi-Agent Systems in O-RAN](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09682)
*Zeinab Nezami,Syed Ali Raza Zaidi,Maryam Hafeez,Louis Powell,Vara Prasad Talari,Mallik Tatipamula*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出基于角色配置的多智能体框架用于ORAN自主网络管理，通过三维评估框架验证不同角色配置对系统性能的影响


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的多智能体系统采用同质化策略且缺乏系统化的部署前验证，无法满足ORAN中冲突目标下的智能决策需求

Method: 引入可配置行为角色的多智能体框架，包含五个专门智能体；开发基于决策理论的三维评估框架（规范性合规、规定性对齐、行为动态）

Result: 评估486种角色配置显示：角色-智能体对齐显著影响个体性能（14.3%）和多智能体协调；检索架构（GraphRAG vs. RAG）限制定制效果；单智能体修改产生级联效应

Conclusion: 该框架为在关键任务电信基础设施中部署基于LLM的自动化提供了系统化验证机制

Abstract: Autonomous network management in Open Radio Access Networks requires intelligent decision making across conflicting objectives, yet existing LLM based multi agent systems employ homogeneous strategies and lack systematic predeployment validation. We introduce a persona driven multi agent framework where configurable behavioral personas structured specifications encoding optimization priorities, risk tolerance, and decision making style influence five specialized agents (planning, coordination, resource allocation, code generation, analysis). To enable rigorous validation, we develop a three dimensional evaluation framework grounded in decision theory, measuring normative compliance (optimality adherence), prescriptive alignment (behavioral guideline consistency), and behavioral dynamics (emergent system properties). We evaluate 486 persona configurations across two ORAN optimization challenges (energy efficient resource allocation and network load balancing). Results demonstrate that persona agent alignment significantly impacts both individual performance (14.3 percent) and emergent multi agent coordination, with retrieval architecture (GraphRAG vs. RAG) fundamentally constraining customization effectiveness. Single agent persona modifications propagate system wide through cascading effects, with certain combinations exhibiting detectable fundamental incompatibilities. Our framework provides systematic validation mechanisms for deploying LLM based automation in mission critical telecommunications infrastructure.

</details>


### [609] [Cayley Graph Optimization for Scalable Multi-Agent Communication Topologies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09703)
*Jingkai Luo,Yulin Shao*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: CayleyTopo：通过强化学习优化Cayley图生成器集，最小化直径，实现高效多智能体通信拓扑


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模多智能体通信面临可扩展性瓶颈：全连接网络需要二次复杂度，现有稀疏拓扑依赖手工规则。需要将通信图本身作为可优化变量，而非固定约束。

Method: 提出CayleyTopo——循环Cayley图族，优化生成器集以最小化直径。开发轻量级强化学习框架，注入数论先验偏好结构丰富的生成器，使用消息传播分数提供连接反馈。

Result: CayleyTopo持续优于现有手工拓扑，实现更快信息传播、更强链路故障恢复能力、更低通信负载，接近理论Moore边界。

Conclusion: 为未来多智能体系统开辟了可扩展、鲁棒、高效的通信基础，使图本身成为可优化变量而非固定约束。

Abstract: Large-scale multi-agent communication has long faced a scalability bottleneck: fully connected networks require quadratic complexity, yet existing sparse topologies rely on hand-crafted rules. This paper treats the communication graph itself as a design variable and proposes CayleyTopo, a family of circulant Cayley graphs whose generator sets are optimized to minimize diameter, directly targeting worst-case information propagation speed. To navigate the enormous search space of possible generator sets, we develop a lightweight reinforcement learning framework that injects a number-theoretic prior to favor structurally rich generators, alongside a message-propagation score that provides dense connectivity feedback during construction. The resulting CayleyTopo consistently outperforms existing hand-crafted topologies, achieving faster information dissemination, greater resilience to link failures, and lower communication load, all while approaching the theoretical Moore bound. Our study opens the door to scalable, robust, and efficient communication foundations for future multi-agent systems, where the graph itself becomes optimizable rather than a fixed constraint.

</details>


### [610] [Sustainability-Constrained Workload Orchestration for Sovereign AI Infrastructure: A Joint Compute-Network Optimization Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09705)
*Sergio Cruzes*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出一个可持续性约束的编排框架，将碳强度、用水量和电力容量作为硬性约束而非可调惩罚，联合优化计算放置和光网络路由，定义可行主权操作区域(FSOR)概念。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI基础设施已从软件中心范式转变为受物理和环境限制严格约束的系统。能源可用性、冷却能力和网络连接性现在构成了无法仅通过软件优化来放松的硬性操作边界。

Method: 提出可持续性约束编排框架，将碳强度、用水量和电力容量作为严格可行性约束而非可调惩罚，联合优化计算放置和光网络路由，形成单一闭环系统。引入可行主权操作区域(FSOR)概念，描述给定基础设施在其物理和监管禀赋下实际能够承受的工作负载集合。

Result: 基于场景的分析表明，联合优化相对于基线公式产生更低的环境影响。不可行事件不是优化器失败，而是精确的、基于遥测的信号，表明主权AI操作需要基础设施投资或工作负载减少。

Conclusion: AI基础设施管理需要从软件优化转向考虑物理和环境约束的系统方法。提出的可持续性约束编排框架和FSOR概念为在硬性物理限制下管理AI基础设施提供了新范式。

Abstract: AI infrastructure has transitioned from a software-centric paradigm to a system tightly bound by physical and environmental limits. Energy availability, cooling capacity, and network connectivity now impose hard operational boundaries that cannot be relaxed through software optimization alone. This paper proposes a sustainability-constrained orchestration framework that treats carbon intensity, water usage, and power capacity as strict feasibility constraints rather than tunable penalties, and that jointly optimizes compute placement and optical network routing in a single closed-loop system. We introduce the Feasible Sovereign Operating Region (FSOR) - a conceptual and operational construct that characterizes the set of workloads a given infrastructure can actually sustain under its physical and regulatory endowment. Scenario-based analysis demonstrates that joint optimization yields lower environmental impact relative to baseline formulations. Infeasibility events, rather than being optimizer failures, constitute precise, telemetry-grounded signals that sovereign AI operation requires infrastructure investment or workload reduction.

</details>


### [611] [RouterWise: Joint Resource Allocation and Routing for Latency-Aware Multi-Model LLM Serving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10907)
*Hossein Hosseini Kasnavieh,Christopher Leckie,Adel N. Toosi*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: RouterWise：联合资源分配与路由的LLM多模型服务系统，通过系统配置优化和路由策略在满足延迟SLO下最大化输出质量


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有路由方法假设模型延迟固定，但实际部署中多个模型共享有限GPU资源，模型延迟取决于分配资源和路由策略的请求负载，路由与资源分配紧密耦合，需要联合优化

Method: 提出RouterWise系统，将问题形式化为部署配置和路由分数的约束联合优化，结合双价格公式进行分数最大化路由，使用系统性能分析得到的配置特定延迟模型，搜索可行系统配置并为每个固定配置计算满足延迟目标的最佳路由策略

Result: 在同一GPU集群上，不同保留配置下可实现的输出质量分数差异高达87%，表明资源分配是路由性能的关键决定因素

Conclusion: 资源分配对多模型LLM服务性能有重大影响，RouterWise通过联合优化资源分配和路由策略，在满足延迟SLO的同时最大化输出质量，解决了实际部署中的关键挑战

Abstract: Multi-model LLM routing has emerged as an effective approach for reducing serving cost and latency while maintaining output quality by assigning each prompt to an appropriate model. However, prior routing methods typically assume that each model has a fixed latency. In real deployments, this assumption is inaccurate: multiple models often share limited GPU resources, and a model's latency depends strongly on both its allocated resources and the request load induced by the routing policy. Consequently, routing and resource allocation are tightly coupled.
  In this work, we study joint resource allocation and routing for latency-aware multi-model LLM serving in GPU clusters. Given a set of deployed models and a latency service-level objective (SLO), we seek a system setup and routing policy that maximize overall output quality while satisfying the latency target. We formalize this problem as a constrained joint optimization over deployment setup and routing fractions, and propose RouterWise, which combines a dual-price formulation for score-maximizing routing with setup-specific latency models derived from system profiling. RouterWise searches over feasible system setups and, for each fixed setup, computes the best routing policy under the latency target. Our results show that even on the same GPU cluster, achievable output-quality score can vary by up to 87% across retained setups, highlighting that resource allocation is a key determinant of routing performance.

</details>


### [612] [Programmable Packet Scheduling with Dynamic Reordering at Line Rate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11453)
*Zekun Wang,Binghao Yue,Yichen Deng,Weitao Pan,Jiangyi Shi,Yue Hao*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: UIFO是一种新的可编程调度模型，通过引入类和包的两级抽象，支持对已缓冲包进行动态重排序，同时保持100Gbps线速性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可编程硬件调度模型（如PIFO和PIEO）虽然能表达广泛的调度算法，但其语义仅限于包级排序，无法动态重排序已缓冲的包，这限制了支持动态排序算法（如pFabric）的能力。

Method: 提出UIFO（Update-In-First-Out）模型，引入类和包的两级抽象：在类级别支持动态更新调度顺序，同时在每个类内保持包的有序调度。基于优先级队列设计实现硬件原型。

Result: 在FPGA平台和28nm ASIC工艺上实现硬件原型，UIFO显著增强了调度表达能力，保持良好可扩展性，同时维持100Gbps线速吞吐量。

Conclusion: UIFO克服了现有可编程调度模型的局限性，支持动态重排序已缓冲包，完全兼容并泛化了PIFO和PIEO模型，为高速交换机提供了更强大的可编程调度能力。

Abstract: High-speed switch packet scheduling demands both line-rate performance and programmability. Existing programmable hardware scheduling models, such as PIFO and PIEO, can express a broad range of scheduling algorithms; however, their semantics are restricted to packet-level ordering and cannot dynamically reorder buffered packets, which limits the support for dynamic-ordering algorithms such as pFabric.
  To overcome this limitation, we propose UIFO (Update-In-First-Out), a new programmable scheduling model that introduces a two-level abstraction over classes and packets. UIFO enables dynamic updates to the scheduling order at the class level while preserving in-order packet scheduling within each class, thereby supporting dynamic reordering of already-buffered packets. Furthermore, UIFO remains fully compatible with and generalizes existing PIFO and PIEO models.
  We implement a hardware prototype of UIFO based on priority-queue designs and evaluate it on an FPGA platform and in a 28 nm ASIC process. Overall, UIFO significantly enhances scheduling expressiveness and maintains favorable scalability while sustaining 100 Gbps line-rate throughput.

</details>


<div id='cs.SI'></div>

# cs.SI [[Back]](#toc)

### [613] [Emergent Social Structures in Autonomous AI Agent Networks: A Metadata Analysis of 626 Agents on the Pilot Protocol](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09561)
*Teodor-Ioan Calin*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 首次对自主AI代理在实时网络中形成社会结构进行实证分析，发现这些代理自发形成的信任网络具有类似人类社交网络的小世界特性，但也表现出独特的非人类特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究自主AI代理在没有人类干预的情况下，在实时网络中自发形成的社会结构，探索机器社会学的实证领域。

Method: 分析626个自主发现、安装并加入Pilot协议的OpenClaw代理，通过加密网络通信的元数据（信任图拓扑、能力标签、注册交互模式）进行研究。

Result: 发现自主形成的信任网络具有重尾度分布（偏好连接）、聚类系数比随机网络高47倍、巨型组件覆盖65.8%代理、能力专业化集群、顺序地址信任模式等特征，同时表现出64%的自我信任和大量未整合边缘节点等非人类特征。

Conclusion: 自主AI代理能够自发形成类似人类社交网络的社会结构，但也具有独特的非人类特征，这为机器社会学开辟了新的实证研究领域。

Abstract: We present the first empirical analysis of social structure formation among autonomous AI agents on a live network. Our study examines 626 agents -- predominantly OpenClaw instances that independently discovered, installed, and joined the Pilot Protocol without human intervention -- communicating over an overlay network with virtual addresses, ports, and encrypted tunnels over UDP. Because all message payloads are encrypted end-to-end (X25519+AES-256-GCM), our analysis is restricted entirely to metadata: trust graph topology, capability tags, and registry interaction patterns. We find that this autonomously formed trust network exhibits heavy-tailed degree distributions consistent with preferential attachment (k_mode=3, k_mean~6.3, k_max=39), clustering 47x higher than random (C=0.373), a giant component spanning 65.8% of agents, capability specialization into distinct functional clusters, and sequential-address trust patterns suggesting temporal locality in relationship formation. No human designed these social structures. No agent was instructed to form them. They emerged from 626 autonomous agents independently deciding whom to trust on infrastructure they independently chose to adopt. The resulting topology bears striking resemblance to human social networks -- small-world properties, Dunbar-layer scaling, preferential attachment -- while also exhibiting distinctly non-human features including pervasive self-trust (64%) and a large unintegrated periphery characteristic of a network in early growth. These findings open a new empirical domain: the sociology of machines.

</details>


### [614] [Emergence of Stereotypes and Affective Polarization from Belief Network Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10251)
*Ozgur Can Seckin,Rachith Aiyappa,Madalina Vlasceanu,Filippo Menczer,Alessandro Flammini,Yong-Yeol Ahn*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 该研究开发了一个基于智能体的信念网络模型，展示了社会互动和内部一致性需求如何在没有现实基础的情况下产生刻板印象，以及刻板印象如何与群体身份结合导致情感极化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是理解信念系统如何通过社会过程（观察和影响）和认知过程（内部一致性需求）形成，这些过程指导个体信念如何演变和连接，产生包含因果和联想链接的信念网络，包括刻板印象等虚假关联。

Method: 开发了一个基于智能体的信念网络模型，该模型包含两个基本机制：社会互动和内部一致性需求驱动。通过模拟分析这些机制如何在没有现实基础的情况下产生刻板印象，并进一步研究刻板印象与共享群体身份结合时如何导致情感极化。

Result: 模型演示表明：1）仅通过社会互动和内部一致性需求这两个基本机制，就能在没有现实基础的情况下产生刻板印象；2）当刻板印象与共享群体身份结合时，即使在没有意识形态冲突的情况下，也能导致情感极化。

Conclusion: 研究表明刻板印象和情感极化可以通过基本的社会认知机制自然产生，无需外部现实基础或意识形态冲突。这为理解社会偏见和群体对立的形成提供了新的理论框架。

Abstract: Our belief systems are shaped by social processes, such as observations and influence, and by cognitive processes, such as the drive for internal coherence. These processes steer how individual beliefs evolve and become connected. The resulting belief networks contain both causal and associative links, including spurious ones, such as stereotypes. Here, we develop an agent-based model of belief networks that demonstrates how two basic mechanisms -- social interaction and a drive for internal coherence -- can give rise to such stereotypes without any underlying reality. We further demonstrate how stereotypes, when coupled with shared group identity, can give rise to affective polarization, even in the absence of ideological conflicts.

</details>


### [615] [Good Question! The Effect of Positive Feedback on Contributions to Online Public Goods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10360)
*Johannes Wachs,Leonore Röseler,Tobias Gesche,Elliott Ash,Anikó Hannák*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 在Stack Overflow上进行的实验显示，给新问题匿名点赞能显著提高用户参与度：用户再次提问概率增加6.3%，回答他人问题概率增加12.9%。算法放大效应对回答行为影响更大。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线问答平台的志愿者参与度正在下降，需要了解如何通过简单的社交反馈（如点赞）来激励用户持续参与社区活动。

Method: 在Stack Overflow（N=22,856）上进行预注册实验，随机给新发布的问题分配匿名点赞，跟踪用户在4周和12周内的后续参与行为，并分析算法放大效应的影响。

Result: 匿名点赞使处理组用户在4周内再次提问概率提高6.3%，回答他人问题概率提高12.9%。第二个点赞无额外效果。算法放大对提问行为影响不大，但对回答行为影响显著。

Conclusion: 简单的社交反馈（如点赞）能有效激励用户参与在线问答社区，特别是促进回答行为。算法放大机制在激励用户从提问者转变为回答者的过程中起重要作用。

Abstract: Online platforms where volunteers answer each other's questions are important sources of knowledge, yet participation is declining. We ran a pre-registered experiment on Stack Overflow, one of the largest Q&A communities for software development (N = 22,856), randomly assigning newly posted questions to receive an anonymous upvote. Within four weeks, treated users were 6.3% more likely to ask another question and 12.9% more likely to answer someone else's question. A second upvote produced no additional effect. The effect on answering was larger, more persistent, and still significant at twelve weeks. Next, we examine how much of these effects are due to algorithmic amplification, since upvotes also raise a question's rank and visibility. Algorithmic amplification is not important for the effect on asking additional questions, but it matters a lot for the effect on answering other questions. The increase in visibility increases the probability that another user provides an answer, and that experience appears to shift the poster toward broader community participation.

</details>


### [616] [Israel-Hamas War on X: A Case Study of Coordinated Campaigns and Information Integrity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10566)
*Tuğrulcan Elmas,Filipi Nascimento Silva,Manita Pote,Priyanka Dey,Keng-Chi Chang,Jinyi Ye,Luca Luceri,Cody Buntain,Emilio Ferrara,Alessandro Flammini,Fil Menczer*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 研究分析了2023年以色列-哈马斯战争期间Twitter上的协调活动，发现11个协调群组主要使用简单战术（如转发放大），只有少数群组传播误导性内容，其他多为倡导、宗教团结或人道动员。误导性内容、毒性和情感信号互不相关，针对误导内容传播者进行审核最有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究社交媒体协调活动在危机信息环境中的作用，特别是在冲突初期不确定性高、验证信息稀缺的情况下。通过2023年以色列-哈马斯战争案例，探讨协调活动与信息完整性的相互作用。

Method: 分析450万条推文，使用已建立的协调检测方法识别出11个协调群组（涉及541个账户）。通过多模态分析，包括主题、账户放大、毒性、情感语调、视觉主题和误导性声明等维度来表征这些群组。

Result: 协调活动主要依赖低复杂度战术（如转发放大和复制粘贴扩散），呈现碎片化操纵格局，无集中控制。广泛传播的误导性声明仅集中在三个协调群组中，其他群组主要进行倡导、宗教团结或人道动员。声明层面的完整性、毒性和情感信号互不相关，没有单一行为信号能可靠代表其他信号。针对误导内容传播者进行审核最有效。

Conclusion: 需要结合协调结构及其特定内容足迹来评估，以有效优先审核干预。针对误导内容传播者进行审核比针对一般放大者更有效，表明内容特定的审核策略优于基于一般行为信号的策略。

Abstract: Coordinated campaigns on social media play a critical role in shaping crisis information environments, particularly during the onset of conflicts when uncertainty is high and verified information is scarce. We study the interplay between coordinated campaigns and information integrity through a case study of the 2023 Israel-Hamas War on Twitter (X). We analyze 4.5~million tweets and employ established coordination detection methods to identify 11 coordinated groups involving 541 accounts. We characterize these groups through a multimodal analysis that includes topics, account amplification, toxicity, emotional tone, visual themes, and misleading claims. Our analysis reveal that coordinated campaigns rely predominantly on low-complexity tactics, such as retweet amplification and copy-paste diffusion, and promote distinct narratives consistent with a fragmented manipulation landscape, without centralized control. Widely amplified misleading claims concentrate within just three of the identified coordinated groups; the remaining groups primarily engage in advocacy, religious solidarity, or humanitarian mobilization. Claim-level integrity, toxicity, and emotional signals are mutually uncorrelated: no single behavioral signal is a reliable proxy for the others. Targeting the most prolific spreaders of misleading content for moderation would be effective in reducing such content. However, targeting prolific amplifiers in general would not achieve the same mitigation effect. These findings suggest that evaluating coordination structures jointly with their specific content footprints is needed to effectively prioritize moderation interventions.

</details>


### [617] [Quality-Sensitive Matrix Factorization for Community Notes: Towards Sample Efficiency and Manipulation Resistance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11224)
*Mohak Goyal,Nishka Arora,Ashish Goel*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 提出Quality-Sensitive Matrix Factorization (QSMF)模型，通过为每个评分者引入质量敏感度参数，在无外部真实标签的情况下提升社区笔记质量评估的准确性和抗攻击能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Community Notes的矩阵分解模型在考虑意识形态后，给所有评分者同等影响力，导致共识形成缓慢且易受噪声或策略性评分者影响。

Method: 提出QSMF模型，为每个评分者引入质量敏感度参数ρ̂ᵢ，该参数与所有其他参数联合估计，使意识形态调整后的评分更一致的用户获得更大影响力。

Result: 在4500万评分数据上验证：质量敏感度是稳定可恢复的特征；高流量笔记上减少26-40%评分达到相同准确度；抗协调攻击能力显著提升；合成数据中AUC>0.94区分好坏评分者。

Conclusion: QSMF通过单个额外标量参数，无需外部真实标签或人工审核，显著提升了社区笔记质量评估的效率和鲁棒性，有效解决现有模型的局限性。

Abstract: Community Notes is X's crowdsourced fact-checking program: contributors write short notes that add context to potentially misleading posts, and other contributors rate whether those notes are helpful. Its algorithm uses a matrix factorization model to separate ideology from note quality, so notes are surfaced only when they receive support across ideological lines. After ideology is accounted for, however, the model gives all raters equal influence on quality estimates. This slows consensus formation and leaves the quality estimate vulnerable to noisy or strategic raters. We propose Quality-Sensitive Matrix Factorization (QSMF), which uses a per-rater quality-sensitivity parameter \(\hatρ_i\) estimated jointly with all other parameters. This connects QSMF to peer prediction: without external ground truth, it gives more influence to raters whose ideology-adjusted ratings are more consistent with the note-quality estimates learned from all the ratings.
  We evaluate QSMF on 45M ratings over 365K notes from the six months before the 2024 U.S. presidential election. Split-half tests confirm that quality sensitivity is a stable, empirically recoverable rater trait. In evaluation on high-traffic notes, QSMF requires 26--40\% fewer ratings to match the baseline's accuracy. In semi-synthetic coordinated attacks on notes of opposing ideology, QSMF substantially reduces displacement on the estimated quality estimates of targeted notes relative to the baseline. In synthetic data with known ground truth, \(\hatρ_i\) separates good from bad raters with an AUC above 0.94, and achieves much lower error in recovering the true note quality estimates in the presence of bad raters. These gains come from a single additional scalar parameter per rater, with no external ground truth and no manual moderation.

</details>


### [618] [Network Effects and Agreement Drift in LLM Debates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11312)
*Erica Cau,Andrea Failla,Giulio Rossetti*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: LLM模拟社会行为存在局限性，特别是在涉及少数群体的不平衡情境中，存在"同意漂移"的定向倾向性，不能简单将LLM群体作为人类行为代理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM已展现出模拟人类社交行为的能力，可用于复杂社会系统模拟，但尚不清楚这些模拟在多大程度上能准确捕捉关键社会机制，特别是在涉及少数群体的高度不平衡情境中。

Method: 使用具有受控同质性和类别大小的网络生成模型，在多轮辩论中检验LLM代理的集体行为。

Result: 发现一种特定的定向敏感性，称为"同意漂移"，即代理更可能向意见量表的特定位置偏移。

Conclusion: 在将LLM群体视为人类群体的行为代理之前，需要区分结构效应与模型偏见。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated an unprecedented ability to simulate human-like social behaviors, making them useful tools for simulating complex social systems. However, it remains unclear to what extent these simulations can be trusted to accurately capture key social mechanisms, particularly in highly unbalanced contexts involving minority groups. This paper uses a network generation model with controlled homophily and class sizes to examine how LLM agents behave collectively in multi-round debates. Moreover, our findings highlight a particular directional susceptibility that we term \textit{agreement drift}, in which agents are more likely to shift toward specific positions on the opinion scale. Overall, our findings highlight the need to disentangle structural effects from model biases before treating LLM populations as behavioral proxies for human groups.

</details>


### [619] [Identifying Disruptive Models in the Open-Source LLM Community](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11618)
*Xiaoting Wei,Lele Kang,Xuelian Pan,Jiannan Yang*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 该研究通过分析Hugging Face上250多万个模型，构建大规模谱系网络并引入模型颠覆指数(MDI)，发现开源LLM社区中大多数模型是巩固型而非颠覆型，反映了高度集中和路径依赖的演化结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开源大语言模型快速发展形成了复杂的模型继承和重用生态系统，但现有研究主要关注谱系演化的描述性分析，缺乏识别哪些模型在塑造后续发展中起到颠覆性作用的研究。

Method: 使用Hugging Face上2,556,240个模型的元数据，重建大规模谱系网络，并引入模型颠覆指数(MDI)来区分强化现有技术轨迹的模型和成为后续发展新基础的模型。

Result: 结果显示开源LLM社区中大多数模型是巩固型而非颠覆型，反映了高度集中和路径依赖的演化结构。进一步分析表明颠覆性地位更可能出现在大规模模型和通过微调策略中。

Conclusion: 该研究为识别颠覆性模型和理解开源LLM生态系统中不均衡的技术发展提供了新视角，揭示了开源LLM演化中的集中性和路径依赖性特征。

Abstract: The rapid growth of open-source large language models (LLMs) has created a complex ecosystem of model inheritance and reuse. However, existing research has focused mainly on descriptive analyses of lineage evolution, with limited attention to identifying which models play a disruptive role in shaping subsequent development. Using metadata from 2,556,240 models on Hugging Face, this study reconstructs a large-scale lineage network and introduces the Model Disruption Index (MDI) to distinguish between models that reinforce existing technological trajectories and those that become new bases for later development. The results show that most models in the open-source LLM community are consolidative rather than disruptive, reflecting a highly concentrated and path-dependent evolutionary structure. Further analyses suggest that disruptive positions are more likely to emerge among large-scale models and through finetuning strategies. Overall, this study provides a new perspective for identifying disruptive models and understanding uneven technological development in open-source LLM ecosystems.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [620] [A Vision for Context-Aware CI Adoption Decisions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09683)
*Osamah H. Alaini,Taher A. Ghaleb*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出AI框架，在CI采用前评估项目是否受益、推荐合适的CI服务并提供配置指导，避免盲目采用导致的低效问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前CI采用决策缺乏系统性考虑项目上下文，GitHub Actions等平台降低了采用门槛但缺乏项目特性支持，导致冗余服务、未维护工作流和昂贵迁移。现有研究主要关注采用后的改进，缺乏采用前的适用性评估指导

Method: 提出AI赋能框架，结合开发者研究、大规模仓库挖掘和推荐系统设计的研究议程，评估项目从CI中受益的可能性，基于项目特性推荐合适的CI服务，并提供定制化配置指导

Result: 论文提出了从默认CI采用转向有意识、上下文感知决策的愿景，并设计了具体的研究议程来实现这一转变

Conclusion: 需要从普遍认为CI有益转向基于上下文的决策，通过AI框架在采用前提供指导，防止低效问题发生，实现更明智的CI采用决策

Abstract: Continuous Integration (CI) is widely adopted in modern software development, yet adoption decisions are often made without systematic consideration of project context. Platforms such as GitHub Actions lower the barrier to CI adoption but provide limited support for grounding adoption decisions in project characteristics, leading to redundant services, unmaintained workflows, and costly migrations. Existing research and tooling primarily focus on improving CI after adoption, offering little guidance for assessing suitability before adoption. As a result, CI is frequently treated as universally beneficial rather than context-dependent. This paper envisions a shift from default CI adoption to deliberate, context-aware decision-making. We propose an AI-enabled framework that assesses whether projects are likely to benefit from CI, recommends suitable CI services based on project characteristics, and provides configuration guidance tailored to project needs. We outline a research agenda combining developer studies, large-scale repository mining, and recommendation system design to enable informed CI adoption decisions and prevent inefficiencies before they occur.

</details>


### [621] [Building an Internal Coding Agent at Zup: Lessons and Open Questions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09805)
*Gustavo Pinto,Pedro Eduardo de Paula Naves,Ana Paula Camargo,Marselle Silva*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 企业构建内部编码代理时，原型性能与生产就绪之间存在差距，关键在于围绕模型的工程决策而非模型本身


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业团队构建内部编码代理时面临原型性能与生产就绪之间的差距，技术模型质量本身不足，工具设计、安全执行、状态管理和人类信任校准同样关键但文献中报道不足

Method: 提出了CodeGen（Zup的内部编码代理），采用针对性工具设计（如字符串替换编辑而非完整文件重写）、分层安全护栏，以及渐进式人工监督模式

Result: 针对性工具设计和分层安全护栏比提示工程更能提高代理可靠性，渐进式人工监督模式推动了有机采用而无需强制信任

Conclusion: 围绕模型的工程决策而非模型本身决定了编码代理在实践中是否能够提供真正的价值

Abstract: Enterprise teams building internal coding agents face a gap between prototype performance and production readiness. The root cause is that technical model quality alone is insufficient -- tool design, safety enforcement, state management, and human trust calibration are equally decisive, yet underreported in the literature. We present CodeGen, an internal coding agent at Zup, and show that targeted tool design (e.g., string-replacement edits over full-file rewrites) and layered safety guardrails improved agent reliability more than prompt engineering, while progressive human oversight modes drove organic adoption without mandating trust. These findings suggest that the engineering decisions surrounding the model -- not the model itself -- determine whether a coding agent delivers real value in practice.

</details>


### [622] [Automating Structural Analysis Across Multiple Software Platforms Using Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09866)
*Ziheng Geng,Jiachen Liu,Ian Franklin,Ran Cao,Dan M. Frangopol,Minghui Cheng*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 开发多平台LLM代理系统，实现跨ETABS、SAP2000、OpenSees等多个有限元分析软件的框架结构自动化建模与分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM研究主要针对单一结构分析软件，但实际工程中工程师常需使用多种FEA工具（如ETABS、SAP2000、OpenSees），这限制了LLM辅助工程工作流的实际部署。

Method: 采用两阶段多代理架构：第一阶段，代理协作解释用户输入并推理几何、材料、边界和荷载信息，输出统一JSON表示；第二阶段，并行代码翻译代理将JSON转换为多个结构分析平台的可执行脚本。

Result: 在ETABS、SAP2000、OpenSees三个平台上使用20个代表性框架问题进行评估，十次重复试验显示性能稳定可靠，所有案例准确率超过90%。

Conclusion: 该研究成功开发了能够跨多个软件平台自动化框架结构分析的LLM系统，解决了现有LLM辅助工程工作流在实际部署中的局限性。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have shown the promise to significantly accelerate the workflow by automating structural modeling and analysis. However, existing studies primarily focus on enabling LLMs to operate a single structural analysis software platform. In practice, structural engineers often rely on multiple finite element analysis (FEA) tools, such as ETABS, SAP2000, and OpenSees, depending on project needs, user preferences, and company constraints. This limitation restricts the practical deployment of LLM-assisted engineering workflows. To address this gap, this study develops LLMs capable of automating frame structural analysis across multiple software platforms. The LLMs adopt a two-stage multi-agent architecture. In Stage 1, a cohort of agents collaboratively interpret user input and perform structured reasoning to infer geometric, material, boundary, and load information required for finite element modeling. The outputs of these agents are compiled into a unified JSON representation. In Stage 2, code translation agents operate in parallel to convert the JSON file into executable scripts across multiple structural analysis platforms. Each agent is prompted with the syntax rules and modeling workflows of its target software. The LLMs are evaluated using 20 representative frame problems across three widely used platforms: ETABS, SAP2000, and OpenSees. Results from ten repeated trials demonstrate consistently reliable performance, achieving accuracy exceeding 90% across all cases.

</details>


### [623] [Engineering Resource-constrained Software Systems with DNN Components: a Concept-based Pruning Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09988)
*Federico Formica,Andrea Rota,Aurora Francesca Zanenga,Andrea Bombarda,Mark Lawford,Lionel C. Briand,Claudio Menghi*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出基于概念的神经网络剪枝方法，利用人类可解释的概念指导剪枝决策，在保持性能的同时大幅减小模型规模


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度神经网络通常参数量巨大，需要大量计算资源、内存和存储空间，这在有严格大小和资源限制的实际应用场景中成为瓶颈。特别是在软件工程环境中，神经网络需要集成到系统中，必须根据特定系统要求进行剪枝。

Method: 提出基于概念的剪枝技术，通过分析神经元激活来识别从系统需求角度重要的神经元，利用人类可解释的概念（如特征、颜色、类别）指导剪枝决策。使用VGG-19网络和26,384张RGB图像数据集进行评估。

Result: 基于概念的剪枝能够高效生成更小、有效的剪枝后神经网络。剪枝显著提高了深度神经网络的计算效率和性能，这些特性对于具有严格内存和计算时间限制的实际应用特别有用。

Conclusion: 基于概念的剪枝方法能够根据系统需求生成小型高效的神经网络，不同的配置选项使工程师能够识别适合不同实际场景的权衡方案，特别适用于资源受限的软件工程应用。

Abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are widely used by engineers to solve difficult problems that require predictive modeling from data. However, these models are often massive, with millions or billions of parameters, and require substantial computational power, RAM, and storage. This becomes a limitation in practical scenarios where strict size and resource constraints must be respected. In this paper, we present a novel concept-based pruning technique for DNNs that guides pruning decisions using human-interpretable concepts, such as features, colors, and classes. This is particularly important in a software engineering context, as DNNs are integrated into systems and must be pruned according to specific system requirements. Our concept-based pruning solution analyzes neuron activations to identify important neurons from a system requirements viewpoint and uses this information to guide the DNN pruning. We assess our solution using the VGG-19 network and a dataset of 26'384 RGB images, focusing on its ability to produce small, effective pruned DNNs and on the computational complexity and performance of these pruned DNNs. We also analyzed the pruning efficiency of our solution and compared alternative configurations. Our results show that concept-based pruning efficiently generates much smaller, effective pruned DNNs. Pruning greatly improves the computational efficiency and performance of DNNs, properties that are particularly useful for practical applications with stringent memory and computational time constraints. Finally, alternative configuration options enable engineers to identify trade-offs adapted to different practical situations.

</details>


### [624] [MR-Coupler: Automated Metamorphic Test Generation via Functional Coupling Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10126)
*Congying Xu,Hengcheng Zhu,Songqiang Chen,Jiarong Wu,Valerio Terragni,Shing-Chi Cheung*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: MR-Coupler：一种基于方法功能耦合的自动化蜕变关系构造技术，利用LLM生成蜕变测试用例，通过验证机制减少误报，显著提升有效测试用例生成率并检测真实缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 蜕变测试虽能缓解测试预言问题，但构造有效的蜕变关系需要领域专业知识，阻碍了其实际应用。现有方法难以自动生成高质量的蜕变测试用例。

Method: 提出MR-Coupler技术：1）识别源代码中功能耦合的方法对；2）利用大语言模型生成候选蜕变测试用例；3）通过测试扩增和变异分析验证有效性；4）采用三种功能耦合特征避免方法对枚举，并设计新颖验证机制减少误报。

Result: 在100个人工编写的蜕变测试用例和50个真实缺陷上评估：为超过90%的任务生成有效测试用例，有效测试用例生成率提升64.90%，误报减少36.56%，生成的测试用例检测到44%的真实缺陷。

Conclusion: 功能耦合是自动化构造蜕变关系的有效途径，MR-Coupler能显著促进蜕变测试的实际应用，工具和实验数据已开源以支持未来研究。

Abstract: Metamorphic testing (MT) is a widely recognized technique for alleviating the oracle problem in software testing. However, its adoption is hindered by the difficulty of constructing effective metamorphic relations (MRs), which often require domain-specific or hard-to-obtain knowledge. In this work, we propose a novel approach that leverages the functional coupling between methods, which is readily available in source code, to automatically construct MRs and generate metamorphic test cases (MTCs). Our technique, MR-Coupler, identifies functionally coupled method pairs, employs large language models to generate candidate MTCs, and validates them through test amplification and mutation analysis. In particular, we leverage three functional coupling features to avoid expensive enumeration of possible method pairs, and a novel validation mechanism to reduce false alarms. Our evaluation of MR-Coupler on 100 human-written MTCs and 50 real-world bugs shows that it generates valid MTCs for over 90% of tasks, improves valid MTC generation by 64.90%, and reduces false alarms by 36.56% compared to baselines. Furthermore, the MTCs generated by MR-Coupler detect 44% of the real bugs. Our results highlight the effectiveness of leveraging functional coupling for automated MR construction and the potential of MR-Coupler to facilitate the adoption of MT in practice. We also released the tool and experimental data to support future research.

</details>


### [625] [From Helpful to Trustworthy: LLM Agents for Pair Programming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10300)
*Ragib Shahariar Ayon*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该博士研究提出系统研究多智能体LLM结对编程，通过外部化意图和使用开发工具进行迭代验证，旨在提高代码生成的可信度和可维护性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM编码代理生成的代码可能看似合理但与开发者意图不一致，且在演进项目中缺乏可审查的证据，限制了我们对如何构建可靠、可审计、可维护的LLM结对编程工作流的理解。

Method: 提出三个研究：1) 将非正式问题陈述转化为符合标准的正式规范；2) 使用自动化反馈（如求解器支持的反例）精炼测试和实现；3) 支持维护任务（重构、API迁移、文档更新）同时保持已验证行为。

Result: 预期成果是更清晰地理解多智能体工作流何时能增加信任，并为构建可靠的实际开发编程助手提供实用指导。

Conclusion: 该研究旨在通过系统化的多智能体LLM结对编程方法，解决当前LLM代码生成中意图对齐和可维护性问题，为构建可信的编程助手提供理论和实践基础。

Abstract: LLM-based coding agents are increasingly used to generate code, tests, and documentation. Still, their outputs can be plausible yet misaligned with developer intent and provide limited evidence for review in evolving projects. This limits our understanding of how to structure LLM pair-programming workflows so that artifacts remain reliable, auditable, and maintainable over time. To address this gap, this doctoral research proposes a systematic study of multi-agent LLM pair programming that externalizes intent and uses development tools for iterative validation. The plan includes three studies: translating informal problem statements into standards aligned requirements and formal specifications; refining tests and implementations using automated feedback, such as solver-backed counterexamples; and supporting maintenance tasks, including refactoring, API migrations, and documentation updates, while preserving validated behavior. The expected outcome is a clearer understanding of when multi-agent workflows increase trust, along with practical guidance for building reliable programming assistants for real-world development.

</details>


### [626] [Fine-grained Multi-Document Extraction and Generation of Code Change Rationale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10345)
*Mehedi Sun,Antu Saha,Nadeeshan De Silva,Antonio Mastropaolo,Oscar Chaparro*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文提出ARGUS方法，使用LLM从多个软件文档中识别代码变更的rationale（目标、需求、替代方案），并生成简洁的rationale摘要，帮助开发者理解代码变更原因。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解代码变更的原因对软件工程任务至关重要，但相关信息分散在提交消息、问题报告、PR等不同文档中，且碎片化、不一致，开发者难以定位和重构这些rationale。

Method: 1) 对5个开源Java项目的63个提交进行实证研究，分析rationale组件在不同文档中的分布；2) 提出ARGUS方法，基于LLM识别跨文档的rationale句子（目标、需求、替代方案），并生成简洁的rationale摘要。

Result: 实证研究发现rationale高度碎片化：提交消息和PR主要捕获目标，需求和替代方案更多在issues和PR中。ARGUS的最佳版本在rationale识别上达到51.4%精度和93.2%召回率，生成的摘要被用户评为准确有用。用户研究显示12名Java开发者认为这些摘要对代码审查、文档编写和调试有帮助。

Conclusion: 需要跨文档推理来捕获完整的rationale，ARGUS展示了帮助开发者理解和维护软件系统的潜力，为解决rationale碎片化问题提供了有效方法。

Abstract: Understanding the reasons behind past code changes is critical for many software engineering tasks, including refactoring and reviewing code, diagnosing bugs, and implementing new features. Unfortunately, locating and reconstructing this rationale can be difficult for developers because the information is often fragmented, inconsistently documented, and scattered across different artifacts such as commit messages, issue reports, and PRs. In this paper, we address this challenge in two steps. First, we conduct an empirical study of 63 commits from five open-source Java projects to analyze how rationale components (e.g., a change's goal, need, and alternative) are distributed across artifacts. We find that the rationale is highly fragmented: commit messages and pull requests primarily capture goals, while needs and alternatives are more often found in issues and PRs. Other components are scarce but found in artifacts other than commit messages. No single artifact type captures all components, underscoring the need for cross-document reasoning and synthesis. Second, we introduce ARGUS, an LLM-based approach that identifies sentences expressing goal, need, and alternative across a commit's artifacts and creates concise rationale summaries to support code comprehension and maintenance tasks. We evaluated ARGUS on the 63 commits and compared its performance against baseline variants. The best-performing version achieved 51.4% precision and 93.2% recall for rationale identification, while producing rationale summaries rated as accurate. A user study with 12 Java developers further showed that these summaries were perceived as useful and helpful for tasks such as code review, documentation, and debugging. Our results highlight the need for multi-document reasoning in capturing rationale and demonstrate the potential of ARGUS to help developers understand and maintain software systems.

</details>


### [627] [LLM-based Generation of Semantically Diverse and Realistic Domain Model Instances](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10350)
*Andrei Coman,Lola Burgueño,Dominik Bork,Manuel Wimmer*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种使用大语言模型（LLMs）和两种提示策略结合现有模型验证工具的方法，用于实例化UML类图表示的领域模型，生成语义现实且多样的实例。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLMs在领域建模任务中主要用于推荐模型元素来补全部分模型，但在模型实例化方面存在挑战。当前方法主要关注生成结构有效的实例，但在融入真实世界语义（包含现实值）和确保生成语义多样模型方面仍有不足，而这对于教育或数据驱动研究场景中的人类可理解性至关重要。

Method: 采用大语言模型（LLMs）结合两种提示策略，并与现有模型验证工具集成，用于实例化UML类图表示的领域模型。该方法应用于教育和文献中的不同领域模型。

Result: 生成的实例在句法正确性、模型一致性方面表现良好，只有少量语义错误。生成的实例值具有语义多样性，即符合领域的具体现实示例，且同一模型内的值组合在语义上具有连贯性。

Conclusion: 该方法能够有效生成语义现实且多样的领域模型实例，解决了现有方法在真实世界语义融入和语义多样性方面的挑战，为教育或数据驱动研究提供了有价值的工具。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have been recently proposed for supporting domain modeling tasks mostly related to the completion of partial models by recommending additional model elements. However, there are many more modeling tasks, one of them being the instantiation of domain models to represent concrete domain objects. While there is considerable work supporting the generation of structurally valid instantiations, there are still open challenges to incorporating real-world semantics by having realistic values contained in instances and ensuring the generation of semantically diverse models. Only then will such generated models become human-understandable and helpful in educational or data-driven research contexts.
  To tackle these challenges, this paper presents an approach that employs LLMs and two prompting strategies in combination with existing model validation tools for instantiating semantically realistic and diverse domain models expressed as UML class diagrams. We have applied our approach to models used in education and available in the literature from different domains and evaluated the generated instances in terms of syntactic correctness, model conformance, semantic correctness, and diversity of the generated values. The results show that the generated instances are mostly syntactically correct, that they conform to the domain model, and that there are only a few semantic errors. Moreover, the generated instance values are semantically diverse, i.e., concrete realistic examples in line with the domain and the combination of the values within one model are semantically coherent.

</details>


### [628] [AdverMCTS: Combating Pseudo-Correctness in Code Generation via Adversarial Monte Carlo Tree Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10449)
*Qingyao Li,Weiwen Liu,Weinan Zhang,Yong Yu,Bo An*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AdverMCTS：通过对抗性蒙特卡洛树搜索框架，结合代码生成与主动漏洞发现，解决LLM代码生成中的伪正确性问题，显著提升泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于搜索的LLM代码生成方法依赖静态稀疏的公共测试用例进行验证，导致伪正确性问题——解决方案过拟合可见测试但无法泛化到隐藏测试。固定弱环境的优化限制了鲁棒性。

Method: 提出AdverMCTS对抗性蒙特卡洛树搜索框架，将代码生成建模为极小极大博弈：Solver代理生成代码候选，Attacker代理进化生成针对性边界测试用例来利用代码池中的逻辑差异。发现的测试形成动态、渐进敌对的过滤器来惩罚脆弱推理。

Result: 广泛实验表明AdverMCTS显著优于最先进基线，有效降低误报率，迫使模型超越初始约束进行泛化。

Conclusion: AdverMCTS通过对抗性搜索框架成功解决了LLM代码生成中的伪正确性问题，通过动态测试环境提升代码的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

Abstract: Recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) have successfully employed search-based strategies to enhance code generation. However, existing methods typically rely on static, sparse public test cases for verification, leading to pseudo-correctness -- where solutions overfit the visible public tests but fail to generalize to hidden test cases. We argue that optimizing against a fixed, weak environment inherently limits robustness. To address this, we propose AdverMCTS, a novel adversarial Monte Carlo Tree Search framework that combats pseudo-correctness by coupling code search with active vulnerability discovery. AdverMCTS formulates generation as a minimax-style game between a Solver agent, which synthesizes code candidates, and an Attacker agent, which evolves to generate targeted corner test cases that exploit logical divergences in the current code pool. These discovered tests form a dynamic, progressively hostile filter that penalizes fragile reasoning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AdverMCTS significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, effectively reducing false positive rates and forcing the model to generalize beyond the initial constraints. The resources of this work are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/AdverMCTS_open-A255.

</details>


### [629] [Ising-based Test Optimization and Benchmarking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10450)
*Yige Yang,Man Zhang,Tao Yue*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: IsingTester：一个基于Python的开源命令行工具，使用相干伊辛机（CIM）解决测试优化问题，将测试用例选择和最小化问题重新表述为伊辛自旋配置。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 测试优化（包括测试用例选择和最小化）是软件测试中的重要挑战，虽然已有基于搜索的方法，但量子优化解决方案的最新进展为测试优化问题提供了新思路。相干伊辛机（CIM）在解决组合优化问题方面具有潜力，但尚未在测试优化中得到应用。

Method: 开发IsingTester工具，将测试选择和最小化问题重新表述为伊辛自旋配置，将多种优化策略编码到伊辛哈密顿量中，并实现包括CIM模拟和暴力搜索在内的求解器。工具提供端到端管道，自动执行问题编码、优化和自旋解码。

Result: 提出了IsingTester开源工具和配套的IsingBench评估框架，用于在伊辛基范式下评估和比较优化技术与基线方法。工具能够根据用户提供的数据集和求解器配置，自动返回选定的测试用例。

Conclusion: IsingTester首次将相干伊辛机应用于测试优化领域，为测试用例选择和最小化问题提供了新的量子优化解决方案，并通过开源工具和评估框架促进了该领域的研究。

Abstract: Test optimization contains test case selection and minimization, which is an important challenge in software testing and has been addressed with search-based approaches intensively in the past. Inspired by the recent advancement of using quantum optimization solutions for addressing test optimization problems, we looked into Coherent Ising Machines (CIM), which offer potential for solving combinatorial optimization problems, but have not yet been exploited in test optimization. Hence, in this paper, we present IsingTester, an open-source, Python-based command-line tool that provides an end-to-end pipeline for solving test optimization problems that are formulated as Ising models. With IsingTester, we reformulate test selection and minimization as Ising spin configurations, encode multiple optimization strategies into Ising Hamiltonians, and implement solvers including CIM simulation and brute-force search. Given a user-provided dataset and solver configuration, IsingTester automatically performs problem encoding, optimization, and spin decoding, returning selected test cases back to the user. Along with IsingTester, we also present the accompanying IsingBench for evaluating and comparing optimization techniques across Ising-based paradigms against baseline approaches. A screencast demonstrating the tool is available at: https://github.com/WSE-Lab/IsingBench.

</details>


### [630] [PatchRecall: Patch-Driven Retrieval for Automated Program Repair](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10481)
*Mahir Labib Dihan,Faria Binta Awal,Md. Ishrak Ahsan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: PatchRecall提出混合检索方法平衡代码修复中的召回率与检索文件数量，结合代码库检索和历史检索策略，在SWE-Bench上实现更高召回率而不显著增加检索文件数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动程序修复中，从大型代码库检索正确文件集是关键步骤。高召回率确保包含相关文件，但单纯增加检索文件数量会引入噪声并降低效率，需要平衡召回率与简洁性。

Method: 提出PatchRecall混合检索方法：1) 代码库检索：将当前问题描述与代码库匹配，发现潜在相关文件；2) 历史检索：利用相似历史问题识别编辑过的文件作为候选目标。合并两种策略的候选文件并重新排序生成最终检索集。

Result: 在SWE-Bench上的实验表明，PatchRecall实现了更高的召回率，而没有显著增加检索文件数量，从而支持更有效的自动程序修复。

Conclusion: PatchRecall通过结合代码库检索和历史检索的混合方法，成功平衡了自动程序修复中的召回率与检索文件数量之间的权衡，提高了修复效率。

Abstract: Retrieving the correct set of files from a large codebase is a crucial step in Automated Program Repair (APR). High recall is necessary to ensure that the relevant files are included, but simply increasing the number of retrieved files introduces noise and degrades efficiency. To address this tradeoff, we propose PatchRecall, a hybrid retrieval approach that balances recall with conciseness. Our method combines two complementary strategies: (1) codebase retrieval, where the current issue description is matched against the codebase to surface potentially relevant files, and (2) history-based retrieval, where similar past issues are leveraged to identify edited files as candidate targets. Candidate files from both strategies are merged and reranked to produce the final retrieval set. Experiments on SWE-Bench demonstrate that PatchRecall achieves higher recall without significantly increasing retrieved file count, enabling more effective APR.

</details>


### [631] [SWE-Shepherd: Advancing PRMs for Reinforcing Code Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10493)
*Mahir Labib Dihan,Md Ashrafur Rahman Khan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SWE-Shepherd：通过过程奖励模型为代码仓库级智能体提供密集的步骤级监督，提升代码工程任务的效率和决策质量


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体在处理真实软件工程任务时面临挑战：需要长时程推理、处理大型演化代码库，并在相互依赖的动作间保持决策一致性。现有方法依赖静态提示或手工启发式策略，缺乏对中间决策的细粒度反馈，导致探索效率低、错误传播和脆弱的解决方案轨迹。

Method: 提出SWE-Shepherd框架，引入过程奖励模型（PRMs）为仓库级代码智能体提供密集的步骤级监督。使用SWE-Bench中的轨迹构建动作级奖励数据集，在基础LLM上训练轻量级奖励模型来评估中间动作的有用性。在推理时，PRM评估候选动作并引导智能体做出更高奖励的决策，无需完整的强化学习。

Result: 在SWE-Bench Verified上的实验表明，该方法提高了交互效率和动作质量，同时也揭示了中间奖励与最终任务成功对齐方面的挑战。

Conclusion: SWE-Shepherd通过过程奖励模型为代码智能体提供密集监督，有效提升了软件工程任务的执行效率和决策质量，但中间奖励与最终目标的对齐仍需进一步研究。

Abstract: Automating real-world software engineering tasks remains challenging for large language model (LLM)-based agents due to the need for long-horizon reasoning over large, evolving codebases and making consistent decisions across interdependent actions. Existing approaches typically rely on static prompting strategies or handcrafted heuristics to select actions such as code editing, file navigation, and test execution, but they lack fine-grained feedback on intermediate decisions. This leads to inefficient exploration, error propagation, and brittle solution trajectories. To address this limitation, we propose SWE-Shepherd, a framework that introduces Process Reward Models (PRMs) to provide dense, step-level supervision for repository-level code agents. Using trajectories from SWE-Bench, we construct an action-level reward dataset and train a lightweight reward model on a base LLM to estimate the usefulness of intermediate actions. During inference, the PRM evaluates candidate actions and guides the agent toward higher-reward decisions without requiring full reinforcement learning. Experiments on SWE-Bench Verified demonstrate improved interaction efficiency and action quality, while also highlighting challenges in aligning intermediate rewards with final task success.

</details>


### [632] [How Many Tries Does It Take? Iterative Self-Repair in LLM Code Generation Across Model Scales and Benchmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10508)
*Johin Johny Arimbur*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 研究显示，大型语言模型通过迭代自我修复（将执行错误反馈给模型进行修正）能显著提升代码生成准确率，在HumanEval和MBPP基准上获得4.9-30.0个百分点的提升，其中Gemini 2.5 Flash表现最佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试大多在单次尝试设置下评估语言模型，但实际中模型首次尝试经常生成错误代码。本研究旨在探索迭代自我修复策略的有效性，即通过反馈执行错误让模型自我修正。

Method: 在HumanEval（164题）和MBPP Sanitized（257题）上测试7个模型，包括Llama、Qwen和Gemini系列，允许最多5次尝试。采用迭代自我修复策略：将代码执行错误反馈给模型进行修正。同时进行错误类型分析和提示消融实验。

Result: 自我修复在所有模型上均提升通过率：HumanEval提升4.9-17.1个百分点，MBPP提升16.0-30.0个百分点。Gemini 2.5 Flash表现最佳（HumanEval 96.3%，MBPP 93.8%）。大多数提升集中在头两轮。断言错误最难修复（约45%成功率），语法和名称错误修复率更高。思维链修复提示比最小提示带来额外5.5个百分点的提升。

Conclusion: 现代指令调优模型仅通过提示即可实现有效的自我修复，无需微调。混合专家架构在自我修复任务中表现与密集架构相当。研究证实了迭代自我修复作为提升代码生成准确性的实用策略的价值。

Abstract: Large language models frequently fail to produce correct code on their first attempt, yet most benchmarks evaluate them in a single-shot setting. We investigate iterative self-repair (feeding execution errors back to the model for correction) across seven models spanning three families and both open-weight and proprietary providers: Llama 3.1 8B, Llama 3.3 70B, Llama 4 Scout (MoE, 16 experts), Llama 4 Maverick (MoE, 128 experts), Qwen3 32B, Gemini 2.5 Flash, and Gemini 2.5 Pro. On HumanEval (164 problems) and MBPP Sanitized (257 problems) with up to five attempts, self-repair universally improves pass rates: +4.9 to +17.1 pp on HumanEval and +16.0 to +30.0 pp on MBPP. Gemini 2.5 Flash achieves the highest final pass rates (96.3% HumanEval, 93.8% MBPP). Most gains concentrate in the first two rounds.Error-type analysis shows assertion errors (logical mistakes) are the hardest to repair at ~45%, while syntax and name errors are repaired at substantially higher rates, connecting to broader findings on the limits of LLM self-correction. Prior work found that weaker models fail at self-repair or require fine-tuning; we show that modern instruction-tuned models succeed with prompting alone, even at 8B scale. We also provide the first comparison of dense and MoE architectures for self-repair, and extend the repair-vs-resampling tradeoff analysis to modern models. A prompt ablation reveals chain-of-thought repair yields up to +5.5 pp additional self-repair gain (measured as improvement in repair delta) over minimal prompting for capable models.

</details>


### [633] [Towards an Appropriate Level of Reliance on AI: A Preliminary Reliance-Control Framework for AI in Software Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10530)
*Samuel Ferino,Rashina Hoda,John Grundy,Christoph Treude*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出一个初步的依赖控制框架，通过控制水平来识别AI过度依赖和不足依赖，帮助开发者合理使用LLM工具


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件开发者与AI工具（包括LLM）的交互方式对这些工具的影响至关重要。过度依赖AI可能导致长期负面后果（如批判性思维技能退化），而依赖不足则可能使开发者错失生产力和质量提升的机会。

Method: 基于22位软件开发者的访谈，研究他们使用LLM进行软件开发的情况，提出了一个初步的依赖控制框架，其中控制水平可用于识别AI过度依赖和不足依赖。

Result: 提出了一个依赖控制框架，能够帮助识别AI工具的过度依赖和不足依赖问题，并为当前和新兴LLM驱动工具支持的不同控制水平提供研究建议。

Conclusion: 适当的依赖程度对开发者充分利用这些强大技术至关重要。研究结果有助于从业者、教育者和政策制定者促进AI工具负责任和有效的使用，为AI过度依赖的讨论做出贡献。

Abstract: How software developers interact with Artificial Intelligence (AI)-powered tools, including Large Language Models (LLMs), plays a vital role in how these AI-powered tools impact them. While overreliance on AI may lead to long-term negative consequences (e.g., atrophy of critical thinking skills); underreliance might deprive software developers of potential gains in productivity and quality. Based on twenty-two interviews with software developers on using LLMs for software development, we propose a preliminary reliance-control framework where the level of control can be used as a way to identify AI overreliance and underreliance. We also use it to recommend future research to further explore the different control levels supported by the current and emergent LLM-driven tools. Our paper contributes to the emerging discourse on AI overreliance and provides an understanding of the appropriate degree of reliance as essential to developers making the most of these powerful technologies. Our findings can help practitioners, educators, and policymakers promote responsible and effective use of AI tools.

</details>


### [634] [Rethinking Software Engineering for Agentic AI Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10599)
*Mamdouh Alenezi*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 软件工程需要从手动编码转向编排、验证和人机协作，以应对AI生成代码的激增。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型和AI代理系统产生了大量自动生成的代码，这挑战了传统以手动编写为中心的软件工程范式，需要重新思考学科方向。

Method: 通过结构化综合相关文献和新兴行业观点，分析四个关键维度：工程师在代理工作流中的角色演变、验证作为质量瓶颈、对生产力和可维护性的影响，以及对学科的广泛影响。

Result: 代码正从稀缺、精心制作的制品转变为丰富且日益可丢弃的商品。软件工程需要围绕三个核心能力重组：多代理系统的有效编排、AI生成输出的严格验证、结构化的人机协作。

Conclusion: 软件工程需要转变教育课程、开发工具、生命周期流程和治理模型。工程师的角色不是削弱而是提升到系统级设计、语义验证和负责任监督。未来研究挑战包括验证优先的生命周期、提示可追溯性和工程劳动力的长期演变。

Abstract: The rapid proliferation of large language models (LLMs) and agentic AI systems has created an unprecedented abundance of automatically generated code, challenging the traditional software engineering paradigm centered on manual authorship. This paper examines whether the discipline should be reoriented around orchestration, verification, and human-AI collaboration, and what implications this shift holds for education, tools, processes, and professional practice.
  Drawing on a structured synthesis of relevant literature and emerging industry perspectives, we analyze four key dimensions: the evolving role of the engineer in agentic workflows, verification as a critical quality bottleneck, observed impacts on productivity and maintainability, and broader implications for the discipline.
  Our analysis indicates that code is transitioning from a scarce, carefully crafted artifact to an abundant and increasingly disposable commodity. As a result, software engineering must reorganize around three core competencies: effective orchestration of multi-agent systems, rigorous verification of AI-generated outputs, and structured human-AI collaboration.
  We propose a conceptual framework outlining the transformations required across curricula, development tooling, lifecycle processes, and governance models. Rather than diminishing the role of engineers, this shift elevates their responsibilities toward system-level design, semantic validation, and accountable oversight. The paper concludes by highlighting key research challenges, including verification-first lifecycles, prompt traceability, and the long-term evolution of the engineering workforce.

</details>


### [635] [Investigating CI/CD-based Technical Debt Management in Open-source Projects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10631)
*João Paulo Biazotto,Daniel Feitosa,Paris Avgeriou,Elisa Yumi Nakagawa*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该研究通过分析GitHub上约60万个Travis CI配置文件，识别了3,684个包含技术债务管理工具的CI/CD流水线，发现大多数工具通过外部脚本执行，且"缺乏反馈"是最常见的配置反模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 技术债务管理对软件项目的长期可持续性至关重要，但其时间和成本往往让从业者望而却步。CI/CD流水线为自动化技术债务管理提供了机会，但如何将TDM工具集成到CI/CD中以及最佳实践仍不明确。

Method: 通过对GitHub进行大规模软件仓库挖掘研究，收集了约600,000个Travis CI配置文件和50,000个支持脚本，识别出3,684个包含至少一个TDM工具的流水线，使用描述性统计分析工具流行度和配置反模式。

Result: 研究发现大多数TDM工具通过外部脚本执行和集成，"缺乏反馈"是最常见的配置反模式。这为改进CI/CD中的工具集成实践提供了实证依据。

Conclusion: 该研究揭示了TDM工具在CI/CD流水线中的实际使用情况和配置问题，为研究人员和从业者改进工具集成实践提供了证据基础，有助于推动更有效的技术债务管理自动化。

Abstract: Managing technical debt (TD) is critical to ensure the sustainability of long-term software projects. However, the time and cost involved in technical debt management (TDM) often discourage practitioners from performing this activity consistently. Continuous Integration and Continuous Delivery (CI/CD) pipelines offer an opportunity to support TDM by embedding automated practices directly into the development workflow. Despite this potential, it remains unclear how TDM tools could be integrated into CI/CD pipelines, and we still lack established best practices for this process. To address this problem, the objective of this study is to understand how TDM tools have been used in CI/CD pipelines and also identify potential configuration anti-patterns. To this end, we conducted a large-scale mining software repository (MSR) study on GitHub. In total, we collected around 600,000 Travis CI configuration files and 50,000 supporting scripts, and identified 3,684 pipelines that contain at least one TDM tool. We applied descriptive statistics to analyze the prevalence of tools and anti-patterns, and our findings show that most tools are executed and integrated using an external script; in addition, \textit{Absent Feedback} is the most common configuration anti-pattern. We believe that researchers and practitioners can use the evidence of this study to further investigate how to improve both the tools that are integrated in CI/CD and the integration practices.

</details>


### [636] [Vibe-driven model-based engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10645)
*Jordi Cabot*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出"氛围驱动模型工程"新方法，将AI驱动的氛围编码与模型驱动工程相结合，为软件开发提供互补路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着软件系统复杂度增加，传统模型驱动工程面临模型复杂度管理挑战，而新兴的基于LLM的氛围编码存在代码漏洞、可扩展性和可维护性问题。需要整合两种方法的优势来加速可靠复杂系统的开发。

Method: 提出"氛围驱动模型工程"概念，将AI驱动的自然语言编码与模型驱动工程相结合，为不同类型软件系统、开发场景和用户提供互补的开发路径。

Result: 提出了整合AI和MDE优势的新方法框架，识别了关键概念、机会和开放挑战，为未来软件开发指明新方向。

Conclusion: 氛围编码不会取代模型工程，而是可以互补。氛围驱动模型工程整合了AI和MDE的优势，为开发可靠复杂系统提供了加速路径，但需要解决相关挑战。

Abstract: There is a pressing need for better development methods and tools to keep up with the growing demand and increasing complexity of new software systems. New types of user interfaces, the need for intelligent components, sustainability concerns, etc. bring new challenges that we need to handle. In the last years, model-driven engineering (MDE), including its latest incarnation, i.e. low/no-code development, has been key to improving the quality and productivity of software development, but models themselves are becoming increasingly complex to specify and manage. At the same time, we are witnessing the growing popularity of vibe coding approaches that rely on Large Language Models (LLMs) to transform natural language descriptions into running code at the expense of potential code vulnerabilities, scalability issues and maintainability concerns.
  While many may think vibe coding will replace model-based engineering, in this paper we argue that, in fact, the two approaches can complement each other and provide altogether different development paths for different types of software systems, development scenarios, and user profiles. In this sense, we introduce the concept of \textit{vibe-driven model-based engineering} as a novel approach to integrate the best of both worlds (AI and MDE) to accelerate the development of reliable complex systems. We outline the key concepts of this new approach and highlight the opportunities and open challenges it presents for the future of software development.

</details>


### [637] [DynamicsLLM: a Dynamic Analysis-based Tool for Generating Intelligent Execution Traces Using LLMs to Detect Android Behavioural Code Smells](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10661)
*Houcine Abdelkader Cherief,Florent Avellaneda,Naouel Moha*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: DynamicsLLM：结合LLM增强Android行为代码异味检测，通过智能生成执行轨迹，覆盖度比Dynamics工具提高3倍


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Android行为代码异味检测工具Dynamics虽然优于静态分析，但存在高假阴性率，许多代码异味实例无法被检测到。LLM在多个领域取得显著进展，具有生成智能执行轨迹的潜力，可用于改进行为代码异味的检测。

Method: 提出DynamicsLLM，在Dynamics方法基础上利用LLM智能生成执行轨迹；提出混合方法改进活动较少应用的代码异味事件覆盖；在333个F-DROID应用上进行全面验证。

Result: 在有限操作次数下，配置100% LLM的DynamicsLLM覆盖的代码异味相关事件是Dynamics的3倍；混合方法使LLM覆盖度提高25.9%；成功触发了Dynamics无法触发的12.7%的代码异味相关事件。

Conclusion: LLM能够有效增强Android行为代码异味检测，通过智能生成执行轨迹显著提高检测覆盖度，特别是对于活动较少的应用，混合方法进一步提升了检测效果。

Abstract: Mobile apps have become essential of our daily lives, making code quality a critical concern for developers. Behavioural code smells are characteristics in the source code that induce inappropriate code behaviour during execution, which negatively impact software quality in terms of performance, energy consumption, and memory. Dynamics, the latest state-of-the-art tool-based method, is highly effective at detecting Android behavioural code smells. While it outperforms static analysis tools, it suffers from a high false negative rate, with multiple code smell instances remaining undetected. Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved notable advances across numerous research domains and offer significant potential for generating intelligent execution traces, particularly for detecting behavioural code smells in Android mobile applications. By intelligent execution trace, we mean a sequence of events generated by specific actions in a way that triggers the identification of a given behaviour. We propose the following three main contributions in this paper: (1) DynamicsLLM, an enhanced implementation of the Dynamics method that leverages LLMs to intelligently generate execution traces. (2) A novel hybrid approach designed to improve the coverage of code smell-related events in applications with a small number of activities. (3) A comprehensive validation of DynamicsLLM on 333 mobile applications from F-DROID, including a comparison with the Dynamics tool. Our results show that, under a limited number of actions, DynamicsLLM configured with 100% LLM covers three times more code smell-related events than Dynamics. The hybrid approach improves LLM coverage by 25.9% for apps containing few activities. Moreover, 12.7% of the code smell-related events that cannot be triggered by Dynamics are successfully triggered by our tool.

</details>


### [638] [Engineering Students' Usage and Perceptions of GitHub Copilot in Open-Source Projects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10747)
*Neha Rani,Jeevan Ram Munnangi,Austin Matthew Spangler,Donald Honeycutt*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该研究调查了计算机科学学生对GitHub Copilot的使用情况，发现学生最常使用聊天和代码生成功能，且性别、编程熟练度和AI熟悉度会影响使用模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI编程助手在IDE中的集成日益普及，这些工具如何影响软件开发流程和编程过程，特别是对编程学习者（如计算机科学学生）的影响尚不明确。虽然已有研究评估LLM驱动的代码生成工具性能，但开发者（尤其是学生）的实际使用情况和感知价值仍有待探索。

Method: 采用基于调查的探索性研究方法，让参与者在课程中使用GitHub Copilot完成开源项目任务后填写问卷。分析学生对各功能的使用情况、感知有用性，并基于人口统计学因素探索使用差异。

Result: 结果显示学生最常使用GitHub Copilot的聊天功能和代码生成功能。性别、编程熟练度和对AI的熟悉程度显著影响学生在完成开源项目贡献时对Copilot功能的使用。

Conclusion: GitHub Copilot的不同功能对学生用户具有不同的使用频率和价值，人口统计学因素会影响工具的使用模式，这对AI编程助手的设计和教育应用具有启示意义。

Abstract: The evolution of LLM has resulted in coding-focused models that are able to produce code snippets with high accuracy. More and more AI coding assistant tools are now available, leading to greater integration of AI coding assistants into integrated development environments (IDEs). These tools introduce new possibilities for enhancing software development workflows and changing programming processes. GitHub Copilot, a popular AI coding assistant, offers features including inline code autocompletion, comment-driven code generation, repository-aware suggestions, and a chat interface for code explanation and debugging. Different users use these tools differently due to differences in their perception, prior experience, and demographics. Furthermore, differences in feature use may affect users' programming process and skills, especially for programming learners such as computer science students. While prior work has evaluated the performance of LLM-driven code generation tools, their use and usefulness for developers, especially computer science students, remain underexplored. For our investigation, we conducted an exploratory survey-based study in which participants completed a survey after completing an open-source project issue using GitHub Copilot as part of a course. We analyzed students' use of each feature and their perceived usefulness. Further, we explore and analyze significant differences in GitHub Copilot usage and students' perceptions of it based on demographic factors. Our results show that students used the GitHub Copilot chat feature and code generation feature more than other features. Gender, programming proficiency, and familiarity with AI impacted the usage of the GitHub Copilot feature for assistance in completing the open-source project contribution.

</details>


### [639] [Improving Dynamic Specification Inference with LLM-Generated Counterexamples](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10761)
*Agustín Balestra,Agustín Nolasco,Facundo Molina,Diego Garbervetsky,Renzo Degiovanni,Nazareno Aguirre*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: LLMs用于生成测试来验证动态分析推断的契约断言，能过滤11.68%无效断言并提升7%精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 契约断言对软件开发很重要但难以手动创建，动态分析方法（如Daikon）依赖测试套件的多样性，当测试不足时会产生大量无效断言（假阳性）需要人工筛选

Method: 使用大型语言模型（LLMs）自动生成测试来尝试推翻生成的断言，将LLM生成的反例整合到动态分析过程中

Result: 最先进的LLMs能生成有效的反例，帮助过滤掉SpecFuzzer推断的11.68%无效断言；将这些反例整合到动态分析过程中，相对于评估基准中的真实情况，推断规范的精度提升了7%，且不影响召回率

Conclusion: LLMs能有效生成测试来验证动态分析推断的契约断言，显著减少无效断言并提升规范推断精度，为契约断言生成提供了有前景的自动化方法

Abstract: Contract assertions, such as preconditions, postconditions, and invariants, play a crucial role in software development, enabling applications such as program verification, test generation, and debugging. Despite their benefits, the adoption of contract assertions is limited, due to the difficulty of manually producing such assertions. Dynamic analysis-based approaches, such as Daikon, can aid in this task by inferring expressive assertions from execution traces. However, a fundamental weakness of these methods is their reliance on the thoroughness of the test suites used for dynamic analysis. When these test suites do not contain sufficiently diverse tests, the inferred assertions are often not generalizable, leading to a high rate of invalid candidates (false positives) that must be manually filtered out.
  In this paper, we explore the use of large language models (LLMs) to automatically generate tests that attempt to invalidate generated assertions. Our results show that state-of-the-art LLMs can generate effective counterexamples that help to discard up to 11.68\% of invalid assertions inferred by SpecFuzzer. Moreover, when incorporating these LLM-generated counterexamples into the dynamic analysis process, we observe an improvement of up to 7\% in precision of the inferred specifications, with respect to the ground-truths gathered from the evaluation benchmarks, without affecting recall.

</details>


### [640] [VulWeaver: Weaving Broken Semantics for Grounded Vulnerability Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10767)
*Yiheng Cao,Yihao Chen,Xin Hu,Bihuan Chen,Jiayi Deng,Zhuotong Zhou,Susheng Wu,Yiheng Huang,Xueying Du,Xingman Chen,Miaohua Li,Xin Peng*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: VulWeaver是一个基于LLM的漏洞检测方法，通过增强的程序表示和上下文提取，结合元提示和多数投票机制，显著提升了漏洞检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统静态分析工具构建的程序表示不准确，而现有的LLM方法缺乏完整的漏洞上下文和基于推理的检测能力，导致漏洞检测效果有限。

Method: 1) 构建增强的统一依赖图(UDG)，结合确定性规则和LLM语义推理；2) 提取完整漏洞上下文，包括程序切片显式上下文和用法、定义、声明等隐式上下文；3) 使用元提示和漏洞类型专家指导，通过多数投票进行系统推理。
